tldr.headline: A real 7-section edition is now reproducible from saved intake artifacts
tldr.summary: The generate-and-publish spike can now assemble a full morning edition from the saved Sprint 1 foundation database plus the validated market snapshot. The strongest packet is still hard-news led by top-tier RSS sources, while business and technology quality remains more sensitive to source mix.
tldr.why_it_matters: This de-risks Sprint 2 at the pipeline level: intake artifacts can be turned into a readable edition shape without inventing fake data or needing deploy access first.

stories.title: We spoke to the man making viral Lego-style AI videos for Iran. Experts say it's powerful propaganda
stories.excerpt: "Slopaganda" is too weak a term to capture how powerful this "highly sophisticated" content is, one expert says.

stories.title: 'It's a special thing to be on Planet Earth': Artemis crew welcomed home in Houston
stories.excerpt: The four astronauts flew around the Moon in a nine-day voyage that took them further from Earth than any humans in history.

stories.title: This idyllic US town was full of police families - and a serial killer in their midst
stories.excerpt: For years, rumours swirled about who could be behind the bodies being discovered on the shores of Gilgo Beach.

stories.title: India refuses to criminalise marital rape. This new series shines a light on it
stories.excerpt: Chiraiya, which has drawn an audience of millions, has prompted conversations on social media around consent and misogyny.

stories.title: Irish cabinet meeting to be held to discuss ongoing fuel protests
stories.excerpt: Hundreds of petrol stations in the Republic of Ireland have run out of fuel as the protests and blockades continued for a fifth day.

sections.label: US
sections.lead: US is currently led by Manhattan DA Opens Investigation Into Eric Swalwell After Sexual Assault Allegations, with Push to Expel Swalwell Could Touch Off Chain Reaction of House Removal Votes also shaping the read.

stories.title: Manhattan DA Opens Investigation Into Eric Swalwell After Sexual Assault Allegations
stories.excerpt: The Manhattan district attorney’s office is examining a claim that Representative Eric Swalwell, a candidate for governor in California, assaulted a woman in New York City in 2024.

stories.title: Push to Expel Swalwell Could Touch Off Chain Reaction of House Removal Votes
stories.excerpt: The House could move within days to consider expelling Representative Eric Swalwell, Democrat of California, in light of sexual assault allegations against him. There could be more to come for both parties.

stories.title: Control of the Strait of Hormuz and Iran’s Uranium Stockpiles Were Sticking Points
stories.excerpt: The U.S. had demanded that Iran immediately reopen the strait to all maritime traffic, but Iran said it would do so only after a final peace deal, according to Iranian officials.

stories.title: What the ‘Real Housewives’ Think About Congress’s Reality TV Drama
stories.excerpt: A visit to the Capitol by stars of the “Real Housewives” offered a glimpse into how the nation’s elected representatives mimic the gossipy world of reality TV. Nobody appears to relish the similarities.

stories.title: In Pakistan Talks, Iran Saw a U.S. Trying to Dictate, Not Negotiate
stories.excerpt: Iran sees American demands as reaching far beyond what it achieved in war. Tehran is gambling that it can withstand further bombardment more than Washington is willing to sustain economic chaos, experts say.

summary_points: Manhattan DA Opens Investigation Into Eric Swalwell After Sexual Assault Allegations (nyt-home)
Push to Expel Swalwell Could Touch Off Chain Reaction of House Removal Votes (nyt-home)

sections.label: Business
sections.lead: Business is currently led by How to help kids form healthy relationships with money: They 'end up in much better financial shape' as adults, psychologist says, with Eli Lilly market share drops, Novo Nordisk holds firm as generic weight-loss drugs flood India also shaping the read.

stories.title: How to help kids form healthy relationships with money: They 'end up in much better financial shape' as adults, psychologist says
stories.excerpt: Amid rising costs and a tighter economic climate, more parents are teaching their kids financial literacy lessons that could serve them well later in life.

stories.title: Eli Lilly market share drops, Novo Nordisk holds firm as generic weight-loss drugs flood India
stories.excerpt: Eli Lilly loses share in India’s GLP‑1 market as cheap semaglutide generics surge, while Novo holds steady after deep price cuts to defend Ozempic, Wegovy.

stories.title: Former Sen. Ben Sasse shines the spotlight on a possible breakthrough for pancreatic cancer
stories.excerpt: Former Sen. Ben Sasse is taking Revolution Medicines' daraxonrasib, which has shown promise as a treatment for pancreatic cancer.

stories.title: Vance, Bessent questioned tech giants on AI security before Anthropic's Mythos release
stories.excerpt: Bessent and Fed Chair Jerome Powell separately met with the heads of the biggest U.S. banks to address the potential cyber threat of Anthropic's Mythos.

stories.title: Man arrested after Sam Altman's house hit with Molotov cocktail, OpenAI headquarters threatened
stories.excerpt: Police arrested a suspect at OpenAI's headquarters for allegedly threatening arson after an attack on CEO Sam Altman's home.

stories.title: TechCrunch is heading to Tokyo — and bringing the Startup Battlefield with it
stories.excerpt: SusHi Tech 2026 is zeroing in on four technology domains reshaping society: AI, Robotics, Resilience, and Entertainment. Expect live demos of humanoid robots, sessions on autonomous driving's software revolution, deep di…

stories.title: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser’s delusions and ignored her warnings
stories.excerpt: OpenAI ignored three warnings that a ChatGPT user was dangerous — including its own mass-casualty flag — while he stalked and harassed his ex-girlfriend, a new lawsuit alleges.

stories.title: PSA: If you use the Meta AI app, your friends will find out and it will be embarrassing
stories.excerpt: Now that Meta released its Muse Spark model, more people are downloading the Meta AI app. And if you join the app, your friends will probably get an Instagram notification about it.

stories.title: Florida AG to probe OpenAI, alleging possible connection to FSU shooting
stories.excerpt: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier plans to investigate OpenAI for its alleged harm to minors, potential to threaten national security, and its possible link to a shooting at Florida State University last year.

stories.title: Sam Altman responds to ‘incendiary’ New Yorker article after attack on his home
stories.excerpt: The OpenAI CEO's new blog post responds to both an apparent attack on his home and an in-depth New Yorker profile raising questions about his trustworthiness.

sections.label: Markets
sections.lead: Indices-only market snapshot from the validated Yahoo Finance path.

quality_notes: All editorial sections were populated from real saved intake rows in the Sprint 1 foundation SQLite database.
Markets used the validated Yahoo Finance snapshot from SCRUM-7.
This spike proves renderability and section assembly, not final production-level ranking or LLM writing quality.
Deployment is still pending environment access, so this artifact remains a local static output proof.
